name: Atomic Eagle Ltd
analysis: AEU just fired a speculative volume-spike breakout — volume hit 8.4× its 20-day average as price broke out of its base. The 9-SMA has reclaimed the 26 — short-term momentum is up. These are high-risk speculative names — they move fast both ways, so size small and respect the stop. Trade idea: entry A$0.4850, stop A$0.3317, target A$0.5350 (0.33:1) — then trail it.
